elements.text:
Progress since 2018
Data schema and standards e.g. Open Know-How, Open Know-Where & DIN SPEC 3105 
Tools focused on making it easier for developers to document the hardware and for people to build the hardware e,g.  Gitbuilding & DocuBricks.
Tools focused on training, quality assurance and data collection e.g. SurveyStack 
Opportunities
Embedding data schema and standards in the tools themselves
Exploring what would be created if developer-focus is merged with user-focus
Attention on embedding quality assurance and calibration into documentation e.g. imagining the equivalent of unit tests for open hardware.
Advancing technical documentation infrastructure for open science hardware
